summary.intent: Fix code review comments on PR #517 in the moltis repo, addressing documentation formatting and missing test coverage.
summary.outcome: Updated providers.md to use capability list format in the Features column, added normalization alias test coverage in provider_env.rs, and committed/pushed the fixes.

repo: providers.md uses a capability list format (not prose descriptions) in the Features column
provider_env.rs contains normalization logic for provider env aliases and expects test coverage for new aliases

code.finding: Features column should use a list format rather than a descriptive sentence
New normalization aliases require accompanying tests; test function named generic_provider_env_normalizes_common_aliases

workflow: Greptile bot is used for automated code review on PRs in this repo
Review comments are fetched via Bash/gh CLI and resolved after fixes are committed

friction: Dolt remote was down at the start of the session, requiring a fallback to direct push and PR creation
